blocks.content: Friday night. Larry Jr. was waiting at the door before I could get my key out.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I feel like I have to wait until Monday.
Seven years old and already doing that thing where he asks the question under the question.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I feel like I did enough. Maybe.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Mr. Cole said if you do the work you can live with whatever comes next.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: He said it to me when I didn't make the spelling team. I think it works for football too.
He was already back in the kitchen. He'd been listening the whole time.
